perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of hands flipping through various 'Hahababy' character cards on a gray table. (2) A woman wearing a green tank top appears sitting in a room with a pink sofa and a plant behind her, gesturing with her hands while talking excitedly. (3) She holds up a card pack to the camera. (4) The screen transitions to grids of orange-bordered 'Da Tou Fo Studio' cards and blue-bordered 'Hahababy Studio' cards. (5) The woman displays specific 'special' shiny cards (flash cards) and explains the differences between regular and special editions. (6) She concludes by showing two cards that form a heart when placed together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-paced acoustic pop background music starts immediately. (2) A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, introducing the 'Hahababy' road run cards. (3) During the showcase, an offscreen male voice provides commentary and banter, accompanied by occasional laughter. (4) High-pitched 'sparkle' sound effects (SFX) play when special shiny cards are highlighted. (5) The music and talking remain continuous until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'Hahababy 路跑 哈佛工作室卡牌' (Hook/Functional: Introducing the card series). (2) '大頭佛工作室' (Functional: Labeling the studio group). (3) '閃亮亮的你們看到了嗎' (Decorative/Hook: Asking if viewers see the shiny cards). (4) 'LOVE LOVE卡' (Functional: Identifying the heart-shaped card set). (5) Various character names like 'Anita', 'Emily', 'Ryan', 'Kiki' appear on individual cards.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Card Showcase -> Special Edition Highlight -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator onscreen; male voices are heard but not seen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with her hair tied back, wearing a light green sleeveless tank top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting featuring a gray table, a pink fabric sofa, and a green potted plant in the corner.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Inventory Showcase -> Comparison of Tiers -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and unbox a collection of branded character cards associated with the Hahababy road run event, encouraging fans to collect the different tiers (regular vs. special).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display and verbal promotion of the Hahababy brand cards.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style typical of Taiwanese variety-style vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses fast cuts and vibrant text overlays to maintain high engagement, focusing on the rarity and aesthetic appeal of collectible merchandise.
